response.justification: While Bogdan has a strong background in software development with experience in geospatial platforms (GISCollective) and performance-critical systems, his primary expertise lies in JavaScript/TypeScript, D, and Node.js rather than the required C++/Rust focus. His geospatial experience is relevant but not deeply tied to routing tiling or low-latency navigation systems. His willingness to learn and adapt is evident, but the lack of direct C++/Rust experience for high-performance routing systems is a notable gap.
strengths: Proven track record in building geospatial platforms (GISCollective) with open-source and Kubernetes deployment
Experience with performance-critical systems and low-latency applications (Dunnhumby media)
Strong problem-solving skills and commitment to software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring)
concerns: Lacks direct experience with C++ (primary requirement) or Rust (acceptable alternative) for high-performance routing systems
Geospatial experience is more general (mapping) rather than routing-specific (tiling, optimization, real-time traffic integration)
Limited exposure to distributed-system concepts (fault tolerance, consistency) in the context of routing data pipelines
